sources.title: 2003 - Arachnia - 10 Fangs, 8 Legs, 2 Claws, 1 Bad Attitude.
sources.description:
A group of science students and their professor survive when their small research plane crash-lands in the middle of nowhere, only to face colossal mutant spiders hatching from meteor fragments. Their only refuge? A decaying farmhouse crawling with arachnid nightmares

Original Title: Arachnia (2003)

⭐️ STARRING
Rob Monkiewicz - Sean Pachowski
Irene Joseph - Chandra Weaver
David Bunce - Professor Mugford
Bevin McGraw - Trina
Alexxus Young - Kelly
James Aspden - Moses Cobb

🎬 CREW
Written & Directed by Brett Piper (Spiders on a Plane, Scarewaves)
Stop-motion mastery by Brett Piper 

🎯 WHY WATCH?
🕸️ Giant Mutant Spiders • ✈️ Crash-Landing Chaos • 🏚️ Farmhouse Siege

🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics
Action  • Horror • Sci-Fi • Adventure • Comedy • Thriller • B-Movie Gold

metadata.Genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Horror, Sci-Fi, Thriller
metadata.Plot: When a small research plane carrying a group of science students and their professor crash-lands in the middle of nowhere, the survivors go to a nearby farmhouse to look for help but soon find themselves besieged by giant mutant spiders.
metadata.Actors: Rob Monkiewicz, Irene Joseph, David Bunce, Bevin McGraw
